title: Chiseled
body:
#

Chiseled is building blocks mod heavily inspired by mods like Chipped, Desire, Bountiful Blocks and Twigs, expanding most vanilla blocksets in the game with new building blocks, more info below :3

**

Current Block Count: 333

** # ![a build made with blocks from chiseled](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c89ebd70237b90641c3cd3187e153c51dd6c7565.png)

a quick build made with blocks from Chiseled 0.1.0 and No Man's Land

##

Extra Info

Blocksets | Blocks | Images | |:-:|:-:| | The **Polished** blockset is a smoother varaint of its material, made with either four of the base material or in a stonecutter | ![polished](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ab8095f0e31ca406a4a33c9e793a1d0b9f6b0dd8.png) | | The **Tile** blockset has a shape resembling that of purpur blocks and is made using two slabs from the **Polished** blockset or in a stonecutter | ![tiles](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b5d4b43d986a4bc70d0b30c8b4e19653aaa20724.png) | | The **Small Brick** blockset is a variant of the default bricks allowing for more variation, made using four of the larger brick blocks or in a stonecutter | ![small bricks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/836e1a4bd8a74dddfb8ba12cc4b293db7a5b9695.png) | | The **Mossy** blocksets are variations of the other blocksets, made with their base variant and either a moss block or a vine, or with [No Man's Land](https://modrinth.com/project/kjZCvAn6) installed, you can use four duckweed or beard moss | ![mossy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8226994b14ddcea7b41946790cb109575d262c63.png) |
Mod Content

And if you just wanted to see what the mod adds, here you go :3

##

Before You Ask

**

Q: Can i use this project in my published modpacks?

**

A: of course, you can do this with any of my projects aslong as the download stays hosted within the modrinth ecosystem :3

**

Q: Will this mod be ported to other loaders/versions?

**

A: any and all planned ports have been made, a version of chiseled for fabric latest version is in development, however that will contain many changes and will be version 2.0, the 1.21.1 versions of chiseled are now discontinued.
